message:
feat(scheduler): expand scheduler lanes, idempotency keys, offline synthesis, and FRIR schema

Scheduler Lane (scheduler_lane.rs, +609 lines):
- Add comprehensive TaskId serde roundtrip, ordering, hash consistency,
  and display tests
- Validate TaskType enum ordering matches declaration order
- Test lane capacity exhaustion, priority inversion detection, and
  backpressure thresholds
- Add scheduler metrics accumulation and reset boundary tests

Idempotency Key (idempotency_key.rs, +476 lines):
- Add key generation determinism, collision resistance, and TTL
  expiration tests
- Validate key normalization and canonical form
- Test concurrent key claim semantics

Offline Synthesis Pipeline (offline_synthesis_pipeline.rs, +325 lines):
- Add pipeline stage progression, checkpoint/resume, and partial
  failure recovery tests
- Validate synthesis output determinism across runs

FRIR Schema (frir_schema.rs, +353 lines):
- Add schema validation, forward/backward compatibility, and
  migration path tests
- Test canonical serialization and content-addressed hashing

Semantic Contract Baseline (semantic_contract_baseline.rs, +300 lines):
- Add contract comparison, diff generation, and violation detection tests
- Validate baseline snapshot and restore semantics

Supporting modules:
- budgeted_optimization.rs: Expand budget exhaustion edge cases
- hybrid_lane_router.rs: Minor routing rule adjustments
- storage_adapter.rs: Expand adapter compatibility tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
